steps.title: Identify the logical signal in the 'because' clause
steps.content: The passage explains that government protections for national trails are superior to protections for other areas. This signals a beneficial outcome for their preservation efforts.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
”Promote” means to advance or support something — precisely how government protections would help preservation efforts. The other choices either don't express this practical support or directly oppose it.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
